story: From a curious coder to an architecture champion — Arjun's journey at OfficeVerse has been nothing short of extraordinary.

events.title: Joined OfficeVerse 🎉
events.description: Arjun walked through the doors as a Software Engineer, ready to build the future. His first PR was merged within 3 days.

events.title: Mastered AWS Cloud Architecture
events.description: Earned the AWS Solutions Architect certification, unlocking cloud-native development skills for the whole team.

events.title: Led First Major Feature
events.description: Independently architected and shipped the real-time notification system used by 10,000+ users daily.

events.title: One Year Anniversary 🎊
events.description: A whole year of impact! The team surprised Arjun with a cake and a heartfelt note about how much his work meant to everyone.

events.title: Open Source Contributor
events.description: Contributed to a React library with 50K+ stars on GitHub, putting OfficeVerse on the open-source map.

events.title: Innovation Award Winner 🏆
events.description: Recognized company-wide for building a developer tool that cut release cycles by 40%.

events.title: Promoted to Senior Engineer 🚀
events.description: After consistently going above and beyond, Arjun was promoted to Senior Software Engineer — a moment the whole team had been cheering for.

events.title: Innovation Champion of Q4 2025
events.description: Led the microservices migration that reduced system latency by 40% and deployment frequency 3x. A true engineering landmark.

story: Priya didn't just grow as an engineer — she grew as a leader, a mentor, and the heart of the Engineering team.

events.title: Day One as a Developer
events.description: Priya joined as a backend engineer with a reputation for clean code and thoughtful design.

events.title: Led Backend API Overhaul
events.description: Single-handedly rewrote the company's core API, cutting response times by 60%.

events.title: One Year ✨
events.description: A year of building, learning, and laughing. The team gifted her a custom keyboard — she still uses it.

events.title: Promoted to Tech Lead
events.description: Priya's natural leadership finally had a title to match. She started leading a team of 8 engineers.

events.title: Completed Leadership Certification
events.description: Invested in her own growth with a leadership and management program — she brought back frameworks the whole company now uses.

events.title: Promoted to Engineering Manager 🎉
events.description: From engineer to manager of 25. Priya's team has the highest satisfaction score in the company: 4.8/5.

events.title: Best Manager of the Year 2024
events.description: Voted by peers and reports alike. The citation read: 'She makes everyone feel seen, heard, and valued.'

story: Meera joined to build a better workplace — and she's done exactly that, one program, one person, one initiative at a time.

events.title: Culture Builder Arrives 🌱
events.description: Meera joined during the pandemic, working remotely — and still managed to make every new joiner feel welcome with virtual onboarding kits.

events.title: Redesigned Onboarding Experience
events.description: Cut new-joiner time-to-productivity by 30% with a redesigned onboarding program. First batch rated it 4.9/5.

events.title: SHRM-CP Certification
events.description: Earned the global HR certification, strengthening her expertise in people strategy and employment law.

events.title: Two Years of People Magic 💫
events.description: Two years, 50+ hires, 12 new programs. Meera's impact was celebrated with a team message wall of gratitude.

events.title: Culture Catalyst Award ❤️
events.description: Boosted company satisfaction from 3.8 to 4.6 in 8 months. The award came with a standing ovation at the all-hands.
